title: Scopper Gaban Tests Luffy
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Luffy, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, World Government, Loki, Unknown person #3 as Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.
scene: Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The aftermath of LOKI's defiance...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...you're the spitting image of red-haired shanks.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you really think I'd just write that off as a coincidence!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Mind your own business...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that matter has nothing to do with you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You're not wrong... but... huff...

dialogue.speaker: World Government
dialogue.text: A great pirate and a celestial dragon...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They're polar opposites.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So, I'm not sure if you are

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You can't blame me for being curious.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyone would find it strange that you two share the same face...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...The pirate you're referring to is my younger twin... he went astray.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At one point, he did return to the Holy Land, but it seems he grew too attached to the filthy world of the surface...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He returned? Huff... I see. It's funny how I ended up hating both of you brothers.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I thought my grudge couldn't get any worse!!! What a family...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You bastards... Huff..

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: When I get out of these chains...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You know what I'll do, right?! huff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'll make it my mission...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...to make sure my buddies are averaged!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Was that supposed to be a threat???

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Captain. You don't have to--

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I know.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He isn't worth getting my hands dirty over.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Isn't that right,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Cerberus?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: GRRWL!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: WOOF!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Graww!!

summary: This part advances the Scopper Gaban and Elbaf’s New Threat through 29 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
